coach.say: And in that moment on the bathroom floor, I understood that even in my state,
coach.hint: Chunk it: And in that moment on the bathroom floor, / I understood that even in my state,

items.line_en: even lying on the floor that someone out there had deemed me worthy of an invitation to a very, very important event.

coach.say: even lying on the floor that someone out there had deemed me worthy of an invitation to a very, very important event.
coach.hint: Chunk it: even lying on the floor that someone out there had deemed me worthy of an invitation to a very, / very important event.

items.line_en: And so, that day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.

coach.say: And so, that day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And so, / that day on the bathroom floor, / I decided to show up.

items.line_en: Just to show up.

coach.say: Just to show up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Just to show up.

items.line_en: To climb out of my dark individual controllable world and out into the big, right, messy one.

coach.say: To climb out of my dark individual controllable world and out into the big, right, messy one.
coach.hint: Chunk it: To climb out of my dark individual controllable world and out into the big, / right, / messy one.

items.line_en: And I didn't know how to be a sober person or how to be a mother or how to be a friend.

coach.say: And I didn't know how to be a sober person or how to be a mother or how to be a friend.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I didn't know how to be a sober person or how to be a mother or / how to be a friend.

items.line_en: So I just promised myself that I would show up and I would do the next right thing.

coach.say: So I just promised myself that I would show up and I would do the next right thing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So I just promised myself that I would show up and / I would do the next right thing.

items.line_en: Even if you're scared, just do the next right thing even when you're shaking.

coach.say: Even if you're scared, just do the next right thing even when you're shaking.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Even if you're scared, / just do the next right thing even when you're shaking.

items.line_en: And so I stood up.

coach.say: And so I stood up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And so / I stood up.

items.line_en: Now, what they don't tell you about getting sober, about peeling off your capes, is that it gets a hell of a lot worse before it gets better.

coach.say: Now, what they don't tell you about getting sober, about peeling off your capes, is that it gets a hell of a lot worse before it gets better.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now, / what they don't tell you about getting sober, / about peeling off your capes, / is that it gets a hell of a lot worse before it gets better.

items.line_en: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.

coach.say: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.

items.line_en: It's all of those feelings that you've numbed for so long now they're there and they're present.

coach.say: It's all of those feelings that you've numbed for so long now they're there and they're present.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's all of those feelings that you've numbed for so long now they're there and / they're present.

items.line_en: And at first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.

coach.say: And at first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And at first, / it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.

items.line_en: But then those feelings start to feel like daggers.

coach.say: But then those feelings start to feel like daggers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But then those feelings start to feel like daggers.

items.line_en: The pain, the loss, the guilt, the shame.

coach.say: The pain, the loss, the guilt, the shame.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The pain, / the loss, / the guilt, / the shame.

items.line_en: It's all piled on top of you with nowhere to run.

coach.say: It's all piled on top of you with nowhere to run.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's all piled on top of you with nowhere to run.

items.line_en: But what I learned during that time is that sitting with the pain and the joy of being a human being.

coach.say: But what I learned during that time is that sitting with the pain and the joy of being a human being.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But what I learned during that time is that sitting with the pain and / the joy of being a human being.

items.line_en: While refusing to run for any exits is the only way to become a real human being.

coach.say: While refusing to run for any exits is the only way to become a real human being.
coach.hint: Chunk it: While refusing to run for any exits is the only way to become a real human being.

items.line_en: And so these days, I'm not a superhero and I'm not a perfect human being, but I am a fully human being.

coach.hint: Chunk it: And so these days, / I'm not a superhero and I'm not a perfect human being, / but I am a fully human being.

items.line_en: And I'm so proud of that.

coach.say: And I'm so proud of that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I'm so / proud of that.

items.line_en: I am fortunately and frustratingly, still exactly the same person as I was when I was 20 and 16 and 8 years old.

coach.say: I am fortunately and frustratingly, still exactly the same person as I was when I was 20 and 16 and 8 years old.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I am fortunately and frustratingly, / still exactly the same person as I was when I was 20 and 16 and 8 years old.

coach.hint: Chunk it: I still feel scared all the time, / anxious all the time, / really all the time.

coach.hint: Chunk it: I still get very high and very low in life, / daily.

coach.say: But I finally accepted the fact that sensitive is just how I was made.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But I finally accepted the fact that sensitive is just how I was made.

items.line_en: That I don't have to hide it, I don't have to fix it, I'm not broken.

coach.hint: Chunk it: That I don't have to hide it, / I don't have to fix it, / I'm not broken.

coach.hint: Chunk it: And I've actually started to wonder if / maybe you're sensitive too.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Maybe you feel great pain and deep joy, / but you just don't feel safe talking about it in the real world.

coach.hint: Chunk it: And so / now instead of trying to make myself tougher,

coach.hint: Chunk it: Where we can all just come out into the big, / bright, / messy world and tell the truth and forgive each other for being human.

coach.say: Life is brutal.
